close_reason: Intentional: secretx-signature is used standalone (not via umbrella from_uri()), unlike backend crates. Re-export saves callers from adding secretx-core as a separate dep. Different usage pattern justifies different convention.
description: secretx-signature/src/lib.rs line 49 re-exports SecretError with 'pub use secretx_core::SecretError'. No other backend crate in the workspace re-exports SecretError — callers import it from secretx_core or from the secretx umbrella crate. This creates an extra import path (secretx_signature::SecretError) that is not present for any other backend crate, which is inconsistent and may confuse callers about the canonical import location. If the intent is ergonomic (avoid requiring callers to add secretx-core as a separate dep), that rationale applies equally to all backend crates and none of them adopt it. Affected file: secretx-signature/src/lib.rs line 49.
title: secretx-signature re-exports SecretError; no sibling does this
